data.title: Zcash experiences developer slowdown with lowest activity since 2021, causing ZEC to drop for two months.
data.description: Developer activity for Zcash has decreased significantly to its lowest point since 2021 due to an ongoing governance dispute, resulting in a negative impact on sentiment within the community. This decline comes as ZEC continues to experience a downtrend for the past two months.

data.title: Dreame Technology win Best of CES 2026 for X-Wind Air Conditioner - 1st robotic arm AC system.
data.description: During CES 2026 in Las Vegas, Dreame, a renowned company in high-end consumer electronics and intelligent manufacturing, unveiled its innovative X-Wind Air Conditioner, which caught the world's eye. This device is the first of its kind worldwide, with a dual design that revolutionizes the cooling experience. The event was covered by the Shuzhi Society, and it highlighted Dreame's position as a global leader. The X-Wind Air Conditioner is set to make waves in the industry.

data.title: Phoenix School Fair on Jan. 24 to showcase local education options with 900+ attendees expected.  Family-friendly event with exhibits and activities.
data.description: Over 900 individuals are anticipated to participate in a family-oriented event showcasing school displays and interactive experiences in Phoenix. On January 9, 2026, it was announced that parents in Phoenix will have the opportunity to explore a variety of school options for their children on Saturday, January 24, in a single location.

data.title: ConvoGPT introduces ConvoGPT OS to automate sales ops with AI agents, aiming to reduce human dependency in various tasks.
data.description: In Greenville, South Carolina on January 9, 2026, ConvoGPT revealed the launch of ConvoGPT OS, an advanced AI employee replacement system. This system aims to reduce human reliance in sales, follow-ups, pipeline management, and deal execution. The unveiling of this innovative technology was disclosed by the company on PRNewswire.

data.title: Houston School Fair at Houston Zoo on Jan 24 to showcase K-12 options with 800+ attendees expected.
data.description: Over 800 attendees are anticipated to gather to celebrate K–12 educational options at a school fair in Houston. Taking place on Saturday, Jan. 24, parents from across the city will have the opportunity to explore various school choices for their children all under one roof. The event will begin at 11:00 am and promises to be a valuable resource for families seeking information on different schools in the area.

data.title: Pandora anticipates 6% organic growth & 24% EBIT margin in 2025, slightly below previous forecasts.
data.description: Today, Pandora released an early and unaudited update on their 2025 performance, anticipating a 6% organic growth rate for the year, slightly lower than the original 7-8% forecast. The group's EBIT margin for 2025 is projected to align with the anticipated 24%. Further details, including audited full-year results, will be disclosed on February 5, 2026, as previously announced.

data.title: Cryptocurrency news: RENDER token up 50% in 2026, MYX Finance rises 34%. Check out the full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: In the first week of 2026, some cryptocurrencies have shown promising performance. Notably, RENDER, the native token of Render, a decentralized GPU compute platform, surged by 50% recently. This increase marks the highest among coins valued at a minimum of $1 billion. Additionally, MYX Finance, the token for a derivatives exchange, experienced a 34% leap due to excitement about the V2 protocol upgrade. These developments suggest early successes for these digital assets in the new year. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
